description.en: Talent DNA Assessment - 8 Intelligences + Cognitive Style Analysis
description.zh-CN: 天赋基因测评 - 八大智能 + 认知风格分析

theoretical_basis.en: Gardner's Multiple Intelligence Theory + AI-Era Career Stratification
theoretical_basis.zh-CN: 加德纳多元智能理论 + AI时代职业分层

T1_language.note: Display shows 0-10 only (no time bonus shown in radar)

T4_music.note: No time bonus for audio questions

ecological_reasoning_speed.source: Average of T8_004 and T8_005 response time

question.en: When memorizing poems, song lyrics, or rhythmic texts, you:
question.zh-CN: 背诵诗歌、歌词或有韵律的文字时，你：

text.en: Memorize easily, can recite after a few repetitions
text.zh-CN: 很容易记住，几遍就能背下来

text.en: Need some time, but usually can memorize
text.zh-CN: 需要一些时间，但通常能背下来

text.en: Quite difficult, need to practice many times
text.zh-CN: 比较困难，需要反复练习多次

text.en: Very hard to remember, even with repeated practice
text.zh-CN: 很难记住，即使反复练习也容易忘

question.en: When listening to others speak or reading articles, do you notice issues with word choice, grammar, or expression?
question.zh-CN: 听别人说话或看文章时，你会注意到用词、语法的问题吗？

text.en: Often notice, sometimes point them out or correct them mentally
text.zh-CN: 经常注意到，有时会指出来或在心里纠正

text.en: Sometimes notice obvious errors
text.zh-CN: 有时会注意到明显的错误

text.en: Rarely notice these details
text.zh-CN: 很少注意这些细节

text.en: Never notice, only focus on content itself
text.zh-CN: 从不注意，只关注内容本身

question.en: When describing something interesting to a friend or recommending a book/movie, you:
question.zh-CN: 向朋友描述一件有趣的事或推荐一本书/电影时，你：

text.en: Can tell it vividly and coherently, others listen with great interest
text.zh-CN: 能生动地讲出来，有条理，别人听得津津有味

text.en: Can explain the main content, but may not be vivid enough
text.zh-CN: 能讲清楚主要内容，但可能不够生动

text.en: Often tell it in a disorganized way, or don't know where to start
text.zh-CN: 经常讲得比较乱，或不知道从哪说起

text.en: Not good at telling stories, prefer to let others see for themselves
text.zh-CN: 不太会讲，更喜欢让别人自己去看

question.en:
You see an advertisement: "Clinical trials prove that 90% of people saw skin improvement after using this product for 2 weeks!" 

Your first reaction is:
question.zh-CN:
看到一条广告："临床试验证明，使用本产品2周后，90%的人皮肤变好！"

你的第一反应是：

text.en: This is based on clinical trials, 90% effectiveness shows the product works well. Scientific data is more reliable than personal feelings.
text.zh-CN: 这是临床试验的结果，90%的人有效说明产品确实不错，科学数据比个人感觉更可信

text.en: I'd want to know: sample size, definition of 'improvement', who conducted the study, was there a control group? Data could be manipulated for marketing.
text.zh-CN: 想知道样本量、“变好”的标准、谁做的实验、有无对照组，数据可能被操纵用于营销

text.en: Could be effective or exaggerated. I'd check more user reviews and independent tests, not just one ad.
text.zh-CN: 可能有效也可能是夸大宣传，需要看更多用户评价和独立测评，不会只凭一个广告判断

text.en: I don't trust ads at all. All commercial claims are exaggerated to sell products. I only trust my own or friends' actual experience.
text.zh-CN: 完全不相信广告，所有商业宣传都有夸大成分，都是为了卖产品，我只信任自己或朋友的实际体验

question.en: When expressing the same meaning, can you think of multiple different ways to say it?
question.zh-CN: 表达同一个意思时，你能想到多种不同的说法吗？

text.en: Can think of many variations, can choose appropriate ones based on context
text.zh-CN: 能想到很多种，可以根据场合选择合适的

text.en: Can think of 2-3 different expressions
text.zh-CN: 能想到2-3种不同说法

text.en: Usually only use the most common expression
text.zh-CN: 通常只会用最常见的那一种

text.en: Not good at varying expressions
text.zh-CN: 不太会换不同的说法

question.en: When encountering problems, your thinking approach is usually:
question.zh-CN: 遇到问题时，你的思考方式通常是：

text.en: Analyze the causes first, clarify the logic, then find solutions
text.zh-CN: 先分析原因，理清逻辑，再想办法

text.en: Try first, change methods if it doesn't work
text.zh-CN: 先试试看，不行再换方法

text.en: Rely on intuition and experience to judge
text.zh-CN: 凭直觉和经验判断

text.en: Not good at analysis, usually ask others or look up answers
text.zh-CN: 不太会分析，通常问别人或查答案

question.en: In daily life, are you sensitive to numbers, patterns, and regularities?
question.zh-CN: 日常生活中，你对数字、规律、模式敏感吗？

text.en: Very sensitive, often notice numbers and patterns
text.zh-CN: 很敏感，经常注意到数字和规律

text.en: Somewhat sensitive, but don't always notice
text.zh-CN: 有一定敏感度，但不总是注意

text.en: Don't pay much attention to these
text.zh-CN: 不太注意这些

text.en: Not sensitive to numbers and patterns
text.zh-CN: 对数字和规律没什么感觉

question.en:
Research finds: "Students who regularly eat breakfast generally have better grades than those who skip breakfast."

Someone says: "So if you want good grades, you must eat breakfast!"

You think:
question.zh-CN:
研究发现："经常吃早餐的学生，成绩普遍比不吃早餐的学生好。"

有人说："所以要想成绩好，就要吃早餐！"

你认为：

text.en: Yes, research data proves a causal relationship between eating breakfast and good grades.
text.zh-CN: 对，研究数据证明了吃早餐和成绩好有因果关系

text.en: Not entirely. Students with good life habits both value breakfast and study. Or better family conditions provide both nutrition and learning resources.
text.zh-CN: 不完全对。可能是生活习惯好的学生既重视吃早餐，又重视学习；也可能家庭条件好既能保证营养又有学习资源

text.en: Might be related or not, need to see how the study was done, if other variables were controlled.
text.zh-CN: 可能有关系也可能没关系，需要看研究怎么做的，有没有控制其他变量

text.en: They may correlate but not be causal. Like 'ice cream sales high when drownings increase' - both happen in summer.
text.zh-CN: 两者可能相关但不是因果。就像"冰淇淋销量高时溺水多"，不是冰淇淋导致溺水，而是都因为夏天

question.en:
A report is due Friday. Today is Wednesday, and you still need to: collect materials (2 hrs), write draft (3 hrs), revise/format (1 hr). Tonight you have club activities, Thursday night you have tutoring.

How would you arrange this?
question.zh-CN:
周五要交一份报告。今天是周三，你还需要：收集资料（2小时）、写初稿（3小时）、修改排版（1小时）。今天晚上有社团活动，周四晚上有补习课。

你会如何安排？

text.en: Tonight after club collect materials (2h), Thursday use daytime fragments to write draft, continue after tutoring, Friday morning revise/format
text.zh-CN: 今天晚上社团后收集资料（2小时），周四利用白天碎片时间写初稿，周四晚补习后继续写，周五早上修改排版

text.en: Thursday night after tutoring (9pm start), concentrate 6 hours to complete everything
text.zh-CN: 周四晚上补习课后（9点开始），集中6小时一次性完成所有工作

text.en: Attend activities normally, wake up at 5am Friday, use 3 hours to complete everything
text.zh-CN: 今天和周四正常参加活动和学习，周五早上5点起床，用3小时集中完成

text.en: Skip club tonight, start report immediately, Thursday check and revise
text.zh-CN: 今天不参加社团活动，直接开始做报告，周四检查修改

question.en:
Phone store promotion:
• Store A: iPhone 16, Original ¥7999, 10% off, Now ¥7199
• Store B: iPhone 16, Original ¥8999, 20% off, Now ¥7199

Salesperson says: "Store B has bigger discount, better deal!" You would:
question.zh-CN:
手机店促销：
• A店：iPhone 16，原价¥7999，打9折，现价¥7199
• B店：iPhone 16，原价¥8999，打8折，现价¥7199

店员说："B店折扣更大，更划算！" 你会：

text.en: Choose B, because 20% off is bigger than 10% off
text.zh-CN: 选B店，因为8折比9折优惠力度大

text.en: Both have same final price, key is whether 'original price' is real. Should check official pricing.
text.zh-CN: 两家最终价格一样，关键在于"原价"是否真实。应该查官网定价

text.en: Both are same price, I'd compare after-sales service, whether genuine, return/exchange policies
text.zh-CN: 价格都是¥7199，我会对比两家店的售后服务、是否正品行货、退换货政策

text.en: Both same price, I'd check other stores or e-commerce platforms
text.zh-CN: 两家价格一样，我会再去其他店或电商平台比较

question.en: In unfamiliar places (like a new city, large shopping mall), you:
question.zh-CN: 在陌生的地方（如新城市、大型商场），你：

text.en: Rarely get lost, can quickly establish sense of direction, remember routes
text.zh-CN: 很少迷路，能快速建立方向感，记住路线

text.en: Have some sense of direction, but may need to look at route several times to remember
text.zh-CN: 有一定方向感，但可能需要看几次路才记住

text.en: Easily get lost, need to rely on maps or navigation
text.zh-CN: 容易迷路，需要依赖地图或导航

text.en: Often get lost, even on routes I've taken before
text.zh-CN: 经常迷路，即使走过的路也容易忘记

question.en: When observing environments, can you notice spatial layouts and object positions?
question.zh-CN: 观察环境时，你能注意到空间布局和物体位置吗？

text.en: Very keen, can quickly understand spatial layout, remember object positions
text.zh-CN: 很敏锐，能快速理解空间布局，记住物体的位置

text.en: Can notice obvious layout features
text.zh-CN: 能注意到明显的布局特点

text.en: More focused on overall impression, don't notice specific positions
text.zh-CN: 更关注整体，不太注意具体位置

text.en: Rarely notice spatial layout
text.zh-CN: 很少注意空间布局

question.en: When imagining an object in your mind (like a Rubik's cube, building), you can:
question.zh-CN: 在脑海中想象一个物体（如魔方、建筑），你能：

text.en: Clearly imagine its appearance, can rotate it mentally, view from different angles
text.zh-CN: 清晰地想象它的样子，并能在脑海中旋转它，从不同角度看

text.en: Can roughly imagine, but rotation is somewhat vague
text.zh-CN: 大概能想象，但旋转比较模糊

text.en: Hard to imagine 3D objects in mind
text.zh-CN: 很难在脑海中想象立体物体

text.en: Can't do it at all, need to see actual object
text.zh-CN: 完全做不到，需要看实物

question.en:
Parking lot spaces: [1][2][3][4][5][6]

Now 4 cars need to park:
🔴 Red car parks in space 3
🔵 Blue car parks right next to red car
⚪ White car parks in leftmost space
🟡 Yellow car parks right of blue car, with one empty space between

Question: Which space does yellow car park in?
question.zh-CN:
停车场车位排列：[1][2][3][4][5][6]

现在有4辆车要停：
🔴 红车停在3号位
🔵 蓝车停在红车右边，紧挨着红车
⚪ 白车停在最左边
🟡 黄车停在蓝车右边，中间隔了一个空位

问：黄车停在几号位？

text.en: Space 4
text.zh-CN: 4号

text.en: Space 5
text.zh-CN: 5号

text.en: Space 6
text.zh-CN: 6号

text.en: Cannot determine
text.zh-CN: 无法确定

question.en: When going out or traveling, can you remember landmarks along the way?
question.zh-CN: 出门或旅行时，你能记住沿途的标志物吗？

text.en: Can remember many landmarks, can find way back from memory
text.zh-CN: 能记住很多标志物，回来时能靠记忆找到路

text.en: Can remember some obvious landmarks
text.zh-CN: 能记住一些明显的标志物

text.en: Can only remember very few
text.zh-CN: 只能记住极少数

text.en: Hard to remember landmarks along the way
text.zh-CN: 很难记住沿途的标志物

question.en: After hearing a new song, you can:
question.zh-CN: 听一首新歌后，你能：

text.en: Quickly hum the complete melody, with good pitch accuracy
text.zh-CN: 很快就能哼出完整旋律，音准很好

text.en: Can hum the main melody or chorus
text.zh-CN: 能哼出主旋律或副歌部分

text.en: Can only remember a little, easy to forget
text.zh-CN: 只能记住一点点，容易忘记

text.en: Hard to remember melodies
text.zh-CN: 很难记住旋律

question.en: When hearing music, you:
question.zh-CN: 听到音乐时，你会：

text.en: Naturally tap along to rhythm, nod or sway, with accurate rhythm sense
text.zh-CN: 不自觉地跟着节奏打拍子、点头或摇摆，节奏感很准

text.en: Can feel the rhythm, but don't always keep up
text.zh-CN: 能感受到节奏，但不总是跟上

text.en: Not very sensitive to rhythm
text.zh-CN: 对节奏不太敏感

text.en: Hard to feel musical rhythm
text.zh-CN: 很难感受到音乐的节奏

question.en: When listening to music, can you distinguish different instruments?
question.zh-CN: 听音乐时，你能分辨不同的乐器吗？

text.en: Can clearly distinguish, can even identify specific instruments
text.zh-CN: 能清楚分辨，甚至能听出具体是什么乐器

text.en: Can distinguish common instruments
text.zh-CN: 能分辨常见乐器

text.en: Can only distinguish general categories (strings, percussion, etc.)
text.zh-CN: 只能分辨出大概（弦乐、打击乐等）

text.en: Cannot distinguish
text.zh-CN: 分辨不出来

question.en:
Which of these three sounds has the highest pitch?

🔊 Play audio:
• Audio A: [Piano middle C (C4, 261.63 Hz)]
• Audio B: [Piano high C (C5, 523.25 Hz)]
• Audio C: [Piano low C (C3, 130.81 Hz)]
question.zh-CN:
以下三个音，哪个音最高？

🔊 播放音频：
• 音频A：[钢琴中音C（C4，261.63 Hz）]
• 音频B：[钢琴高音C（C5，523.25 Hz）]
• 音频C：[钢琴低音C（C3，130.81 Hz）]

text.en: Audio A
text.zh-CN: 音频A

text.en: Audio B
text.zh-CN: 音频B

text.en: Audio C
text.zh-CN: 音频C

text.en: Cannot tell the difference
text.zh-CN: 听不出差别

question.en: You want to add background music to a 'sad farewell' scene, you would choose:
question.zh-CN: 你想为一段“悲伤的离别”场景配背景音乐，你会选：

text.en: Slow tempo, minor key, mainly strings, lighter volume
text.zh-CN: 慢速度、小调、弦乐为主、音量较轻

text.en: Fast tempo, major key, mainly percussion, louder volume
text.zh-CN: 快速度、大调、打击乐为主、音量较大

text.en: Medium tempo, major key, piano solo
text.zh-CN: 中速度、大调、钢琴独奏

text.en: Don't know, just pick any lyrical song
text.zh-CN: 不知道，随便选一首抒情歌曲

question.en: When learning new motor or movement skills (like dance, ball sports, playing instruments), you:
question.zh-CN: 学习新的运动或动作技能时（如舞蹈、球类运动、乐器演奏），你：

text.en: Can imitate after watching once or twice, learn very quickly
text.zh-CN: 看一两遍就能模仿，学得很快

text.en: Need to practice a few times, but can master it
text.zh-CN: 需要练习几次，但能掌握

text.en: Need longer time of repeated practice
text.zh-CN: 需要较长时间反复练习

text.en: Learning movements is very difficult for me
text.zh-CN: 学习动作对我来说很困难

question.en: When using tools or equipment (like screwdrivers, scissors, kitchen utensils, lab instruments), you:
question.zh-CN: 使用工具或器械时（如螺丝刀、剪刀、厨具、实验器材），你：

text.en: Very skillful, can control precisely
text.zh-CN: 很熟练，能精准控制

text.en: Quite skillful
text.zh-CN: 比较熟练

text.en: Need time to adapt
text.zh-CN: 需要时间适应

text.en: Not good at operating tools
text.zh-CN: 不太擅长操作工具

question.en: In activities requiring hand-eye coordination (like playing ball, driving, gaming), you:
question.zh-CN: 需要手眼协调的活动（如打球、开车、玩游戏），你：

text.en: Fast reactions, good coordination, can control accurately
text.zh-CN: 反应快，协调性好，能准确控制

text.en: Coordination is decent
text.zh-CN: 协调性还可以

text.en: Coordination is average, often make mistakes
text.zh-CN: 协调性一般，经常出错

text.en: Poor coordination
text.zh-CN: 协调性较差

question.en: When assembling/disassembling items, folding paper, or doing handicrafts, you:
question.zh-CN: 拆装物品、折纸或手工制作时，你：

text.en: Very good at it, can understand structure and operate accurately
text.zh-CN: 很拿手，能理解结构并准确操作

text.en: Quite skillful
text.zh-CN: 比较擅长

text.en: Need instructions or guidance
text.zh-CN: 需要说明书或指导

text.en: Often fail or give up
text.zh-CN: 经常失败或放弃

question.en: When learning new knowledge or skills, you prefer to:
question.zh-CN: 学习新知识或技能时，你更喜欢：

text.en: Hands-on operation, actual experience, learn while doing
text.zh-CN: 亲手操作、实际体验，边做边学

text.en: Watch video demonstrations, then try myself
text.zh-CN: 看视频演示，然后自己尝试

text.en: Read written instructions or listen to explanations
text.zh-CN: 阅读文字说明或听讲解

text.en: Either way works, no particular preference
text.zh-CN: 都可以，没有特别偏好

question.en: When a friend is in a bad mood but doesn't say so explicitly, you can:
question.zh-CN: 朋友心情不好，但没有明说。你能：

text.en: Tell from facial expressions, tone, body language, and can sense their emotions
text.zh-CN: 从表情、语气、肢体语言看出来，并能感受到他的情绪

text.en: Vaguely sense something is wrong, but not quite sure
text.zh-CN: 隐约感觉不对劲，但不太确定

text.en: Won't notice unless they tell me
text.zh-CN: 除非他说出来，否则不会注意到

text.en: Even if they tell me, I can't really understand their feelings
text.zh-CN: 即使他说了，我也不太能理解他的感受

question.en: When seeing others sad or in difficulty, you:
question.zh-CN: 看到别人难过或遇到困难时，你：

text.en: Can empathize, want to comfort or help them
text.zh-CN: 能感同身受，想要安慰或帮助他们

text.en: Can understand their feelings
text.zh-CN: 能理解他们的感受

text.en: Know they're unhappy, but don't know what to do
text.zh-CN: 知道他们不开心，但不知道该做什么

text.en: Can't really understand why they're sad
text.zh-CN: 不太能理解他们为什么难过

question.en: In social situations (like parties, group discussions), you:
question.zh-CN: 在社交场合（如聚会、小组讨论），你：

text.en: Can interact freely, easily connect with different people
text.zh-CN: 能自如交流，容易和不同的人建立联系

text.en: Can interact normally, but need some time to adapt
text.zh-CN: 能正常交流，但需要一点时间适应

text.en: Feel somewhat uncomfortable, prefer to listen
text.zh-CN: 感到不太自在，更愿意倾听

text.en: Feel very uncomfortable, try to avoid socializing
text.zh-CN: 感到很不舒服，尽量避免社交

question.en: In a group project, two members have disagreements about the plan and are arguing. As a team member, you would:
question.zh-CN: 小组项目中，两个成员对方案有分歧，争执不下。作为组员，你会：

text.en: Let both sides express their ideas and reasons, find common ground, propose compromise or better solution
text.zh-CN: 让双方说出想法和理由，寻找共同点，提出折中或更好的方案

text.en: Vote to decide, minority follows majority
text.zh-CN: 投票决定，少数服从多数

text.en: Persuade one side to accept the other's plan
text.zh-CN: 说服一方接受另一方的方案

text.en: Don't get involved, let them resolve it themselves
text.zh-CN: 不参与，让他们自己解决

question.en:
A friend tells you: "Your idea is quite interesting..." 
But their tone is hesitant, expression forced.

You understand this as:
question.zh-CN:
朋友对你说："你这个想法挺有意思的..."
但他的语气犹豫，表情勉强。

你理解为：

text.en: They really think it's interesting, I should continue
text.zh-CN: 他真的觉得有意思，我应该继续

text.en: They may not approve, but don't want to say it directly to hurt me
text.zh-CN: 他可能不太认可，但不想直说伤害我

text.en: They're just being perfunctory, not interested at all
text.zh-CN: 他在敷衍我，根本没兴趣

text.en: Don't know, wait for them to say it explicitly
text.zh-CN: 不知道，等他明说

question.en: Regarding your strengths and weaknesses, you:
question.zh-CN: 对于自己的优点和缺点，你：

text.en: Very clear, can specifically articulate them
text.zh-CN: 很清楚，能具体说出来

text.en: Roughly know some
text.zh-CN: 大概知道一些

text.en: Not very clear
text.zh-CN: 不太清楚

text.en: Haven't thought much about it
text.zh-CN: 没怎么想过

question.en: When in a bad mood, can you:
question.zh-CN: 心情不好时，你能：

text.en: Accurately identify the reason (e.g., "because I did poorly on a test", "because I argued with a friend")
text.zh-CN: 准确说出原因（如“因为考试没考好”“因为和朋友吵架了”）

text.en: Know I'm unhappy, but can't articulate the specific reason
text.zh-CN: 知道不开心，但说不太清具体原因

text.en: Don't pay much attention to my emotional changes
text.zh-CN: 不太注意自己的情绪变化

text.en: Even when in a bad mood, hard to realize or describe it
text.zh-CN: 即使心情不好，也很难意识到或描述

question.en: After encountering setbacks or failures, you will:
question.zh-CN: 遇到挫折或失败后，你会：

text.en: Seriously reflect on causes and lessons, think about how to improve
text.zh-CN: 认真反思原因和教训，思考如何改进

text.en: Think about it, but quickly move on
text.zh-CN: 想一想，但很快就过去了

text.en: Think it's bad luck or external reasons
text.zh-CN: 觉得是运气不好或外部原因

text.en: Try not to think about it, avoid unpleasantness
text.zh-CN: 尽量不去想，避免不愉快

question.en: Regarding the next 1-3 years, you:
question.zh-CN: 对于未来1-3年，你：

text.en: Have clear goals, know what kind of person I want to become
text.zh-CN: 有明确的目标，知道自己想成为什么样的人

text.en: Have some vague ideas
text.zh-CN: 有一些模糊的想法

text.en: Take it step by step, no specific plan
text.zh-CN: 走一步看一步，没有具体规划

text.en: Don't think much about these questions
text.zh-CN: 不太想这些问题

question.en: When alone (no socializing, entertainment), you:
question.zh-CN: 一个人独处时（没有社交、娱乐），你：

text.en: Really enjoy it, can think, do my own things, feel fulfilled
text.zh-CN: 很享受，可以思考、做自己的事，感觉充实

text.en: It's okay, but prefer being with people
text.zh-CN: 还可以，但更喜欢和人在一起

text.en: Feel bored, lonely
text.zh-CN: 觉得无聊、孤单

text.en: Feel anxious and restless
text.zh-CN: 会焦虑不安

question.en: Can you distinguish different animals and plants?
question.zh-CN: 你能区分不同的动植物吗？

text.en: Can identify many species, very interested in animals and plants
text.zh-CN: 能识别很多种，对动植物很感兴趣

text.en: Can identify some common ones
text.zh-CN: 能识别一些常见的

text.en: Can only identify very few
text.zh-CN: 只能识别极少数

text.en: Basically cannot distinguish
text.zh-CN: 基本分辨不出来

question.en: Regarding seasonal changes, you:
question.zh-CN: 对于季节变化，你：

text.en: Can notice specific changes (like which flowers bloom, which birds arrive, leaf colors)
text.zh-CN: 能注意到具体的变化（如哪种花开了、哪种鸟来了、树叶的颜色）

text.en: Know seasons are changing
text.zh-CN: 知道季节在变化

text.en: Don't pay much attention to these
text.zh-CN: 不太注意这些

text.en: Rarely pay attention to natural changes
text.zh-CN: 很少关注自然变化

question.en: Do you like interacting with nature?
question.zh-CN: 你喜欢接触自然吗？

text.en: Very much, often actively interact with nature
text.zh-CN: 非常喜欢，经常主动接触自然

text.en: Like it, occasionally go
text.zh-CN: 喜欢，偶尔会去

text.en: Don't particularly like it, prefer staying indoors
text.zh-CN: 不太喜欢，更喜欢待在室内

text.en: Not interested at all
text.zh-CN: 完全不感兴趣

question.en:
Grassland ecosystem: Grass → Rabbit → Fox → Wolf

If fox population decreases significantly, the most likely result is:
question.zh-CN:
草原生态系统：草→兔子→狐狸→狼

如果狐狸数量大量减少，最可能的结果是：

text.en: Rabbits increase, grass decreases, wolves may decrease
text.zh-CN: 兔子增加，草减少，狼可能减少

text.en: All animals decrease
text.zh-CN: 所有动物都减少

text.en: No impact
text.zh-CN: 没有影响

text.en: Grass grows better
text.zh-CN: 草长得更好

question.en:
Your indoor pothos plant shows these symptoms:
• Leaf edges yellowing and curling
• Soil surface white and hardened
• Leaves near window more yellow

Most likely cause is:
question.zh-CN:
你的室内绿萝出现以下症状：
• 叶子边缘发黄、卷曲
• 土壤表面发白、结块
• 靠近窗户的叶子更黄

最可能的原因是：

text.en: Overwatering, root rot
text.zh-CN: 浇水过多，根部腐烂

text.en: Long-term lack of water, soil compaction
text.zh-CN: 长期缺水，土壤板结

text.en: Too much light, leaf burn
text.zh-CN: 光照过强，叶片灼伤

text.en: Nitrogen deficiency, malnutrition
text.zh-CN: 缺少氮肥，营养不良

rationale.en: Lock #1 (92% best match) and #3 to maximize curiosity and upgrade conversion
rationale.zh-CN: 锁定#1（92%最佳匹配）和#3以最大化好奇心和付费转化
